ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti appeared by zoom for Gary Wong (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it believes it is prepared to submit on the matter for review of the order and that the matter appears to be in order. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti for Gary Wong.
Chris Dewys for Catherine Wong (Objector).

The Court stated that it is not clear an amendment was needed and that there is an issue with publication. Mr. Dewys stated that his Client is still objecting. Mr. Salfiti stated that his Client's position is that the Sister has no standing, that she is not an interested party, that she does not take by intestacy and that it is his understanding that they are not contesting the will. Mr. Dewys stated that he would like his objection to continue and brief the issue of standing. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is under submission for the Court to review what has been filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Wong in Propria Persona.
Christopher Dewys for Catherine Wong (Objector).

Mr. Wong stated that he made some effort to consult with the Decedent's Attorney, that they had been unable to speak, that there is no requirement to have an Attorney for a probate case and that if it turns out to be more complicated he will act on it. Mr. Dewys stated that there will be no competing petition, but he will keep his objections on file, that he believes Mr. Wong obtaining Counsel will relieve concerns, and that he will consider mediation and appointment of a professional fiduciary. Mr. Dewys also stated that he anticipates there will be technical and difficult issues to deal with, that he does not feel they could have meaningful mediation without Mr. Wong having Counsel and that he is on board with Mr. Wong obtaining an Attorney. The Court once again expressed concern about Mr. Wong being self represented, stated that it will continue the matter for one month if Mr. Wong could assure it that he would hire an Attorney, or that it will take the matter under submission and that it is leaning towards denying the petition. Mr. Wong asked the Court consider that there is no requirement for him to have an Attorney, stated that he filed a timely response to the objections, that he was hoping to deal with the objections/allegations today and that there is an issue with creditors. The Court stated that it has serious concern about Mr. Wong taking administration of this estate to completion and that it has no assurance of Mr. Wong's intent to hire Counsel. The Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Continued To Oct-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Wong (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.
Christopher Dewys appeared by telephone for Catherine Wong.

Mr. Dewys stated that he is objecting, that Catherine is the Sibling of the Decedent, that he filed his objections on Monday and that he does not anticipate filing a competing petition. The Court expressed concern about appointing an Administrator without an Attorney, spoke of the requirements, rules that need to be followed and liabilities that come with administering an estate, and strongly advised Mr. Wong to hire an Attorney. Mr. Dewys stated that he is having difficulty with Mr. Wong's address. Mr. Wong stated that the address on his petition is the appropriate address for service. The Court noted that notice and publication did not include Mr. Wong's phone number, and informed Mr. Wong of the importance of providing accurate and all contact information to the Court. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to see the objections and to see if anything is filed in response.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Continued To Oct-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
